svg.title: Role-Based Prompting — Developer Edition, ABTalks 60-Day Claude AI Mastery Challenge
svg.desc: LinkedIn post graphic spotlighting the Developer persona for Role-Based Prompting, with before/after comparison, developer sample prompts, and five persona cards.
svg.text: ABTALK S · 60-DAY CLAUDE AI MASTERY CHALLENGE
Turn Claude into Any Expert You Need
"You are a senior React dev. Refactor this component for performance and readability."
"You are a DevOps engineer. Write a CI/CD pipeline for a Node.js app using GitHub Actions."
"You are a security engineer. Review my API for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities."
"You are a staff engineer. Explain this architecture trade-off to a junior dev."
